interfaces.name: getHomePageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get highlighted grant programs, upcoming deadlines, and featured opportunities for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getFocusAreas
interfaces.description: Return the list of available focus/program areas for use in filters, organization profiles, and alerts.

interfaces.name: getGrantSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the open grant opportunities search page, including focus areas, award ranges, and deadline defaults.

interfaces.name: searchOpenGrantPrograms
interfaces.description: Search and browse open grant opportunities using filters such as focus areas, award amount range, deadline range, and sort order. Only returns GrantPrograms with status 'open'.

parameters.name: focusAreaCodes
parameters.description: Optional list of FocusArea.code values to filter by.

parameters.name: deadlineStartDate
parameters.description: Filter grants with applicationDeadline on or after this date (format e.g., '2025-05-01').

parameters.name: deadlineEndDate
parameters.description: Filter grants with applicationDeadline on or before this date (format e.g., '2025-12-31').

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'max_award_desc', 'max_award_asc', 'deadline_soonest_first', 'deadline_latest_first'.

interfaces.name: getPastGrantsFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Past Grants section, including available years, focus areas, and award amount range.

interfaces.name: searchPastGrants
interfaces.description: Search past grant awards with filters such as year awarded, focus area, and award amount range. Returns only awards with awardStatus 'awarded'.

parameters.name: yearAwarded
parameters.description: If provided, filters to grants awarded in this year (e.g., 2023).

parameters.name: focusAreaCodes
parameters.description: Optional list of FocusArea.code values to filter by.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'amount_desc', 'amount_asc', 'year_desc', 'year_asc'.

interfaces.name: getGrantProgramDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific grant program, including description, eligibility, focus areas, award range, deadlines, and match requirement, along with user-specific flags like whether it is saved or has an application started.

parameters.name: grantProgramId
parameters.description: Identifier of the GrantProgram (typically derived from the page URL).

userApplicationStatus.description: Status of the current user's application for this grant, e.g., 'not_started', 'draft_in_progress', 'submitted'.

interfaces.name: saveGrantToMyGrants
interfaces.description: Save a grant program to the current user's saved grants list and optionally associate it with an application plan. If a newPlanName is provided without a planId, a new ApplicationPlan is created automatically.

parameters.name: grantProgramId
parameters.description: Identifier of the GrantProgram being saved (from the grant detail or search result context).

parameters.name: savedFromContext
parameters.description: Context from which the grant was saved, e.g., 'grant_detail', 'search_results', 'comparison', 'other'.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Optional existing ApplicationPlan id to associate this saved grant with.

parameters.name: newPlanName
parameters.description: If provided (and planId is not), creates a new ApplicationPlan with this name and attaches the saved grant to it (e.g., 'arts_priority_2025').

interfaces.name: getMyGrantsAndPlans
interfaces.description: List the current user's saved grants and their organization into application plans for the My Grants & Plans page, including basic grant and deadline info.

interfaces.name: renameApplicationPlan
interfaces.description: Rename an existing application plan (e.g., updating 'Arts Priority 2025').

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Identifier of the ApplicationPlan to rename.

interfaces.name: removeSavedGrant
interfaces.description: Remove a saved grant from the current user's saved grants or from a specific plan.

parameters.name: savedGrantId
parameters.description: Identifier of the SavedGrant to remove.

interfaces.name: updateSavedGrantPlan
interfaces.description: Move or assign a saved grant to an application plan. Creates a new plan if targetPlanId is not provided and newPlanName is.

parameters.name: savedGrantId
parameters.description: Identifier of the SavedGrant to update.

parameters.name: targetPlanId
parameters.description: Existing ApplicationPlan id to move this saved grant into.

parameters.name: newPlanName
parameters.description: Optional name of a new plan to create and assign this saved grant to if targetPlanId is not provided.

interfaces.name: startGrantApplication
interfaces.description: Create a new draft grant application for the current user for a given grant program and return the application so the form can be shown.

parameters.name: grantProgramId
parameters.description: Identifier of the GrantProgram to apply for (from the grant detail page).

interfaces.name: getApplicationFormState
interfaces.description: Get the current state of a grant application for display in the multi-step application form, including basic grant info.

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Identifier of the GrantApplication being edited.

interfaces.name: saveApplicationDraft
interfaces.description: Save the current state of an application as a draft, updating project-level fields such as title, requested amount, and start date.

parameters.name: projectStartDate
parameters.description: Date string for project start, e.g., '2025-09-01'.

interfaces.name: submitGrantApplication
interfaces.description: Submit a completed grant application for review, changing its status to 'submitted' when successful.

interfaces.name: getApplicationsList
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current user's in-progress (draft) and submitted applications for display on the dashboard and My Grants pages.

interfaces.name: getDashboardOverview
interfaces.description: Get a summary for the account dashboard, including counts of saved grants, applications, and upcoming deadlines, plus quick links data.

interfaces.name: createAccount
interfaces.description: Register a new account (individual applicant or organization) for the single-user environment and return the created account.

parameters.name: accountType
parameters.description: Type of account to create, e.g., 'individual_applicant' or 'organization_account'.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Full name for individual applicant accounts.

parameters.name: organizationName
parameters.description: Organization name for organization accounts.

interfaces.name: getOrganizationProfile
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current user's organization profile, if any, along with available program areas for selection.

interfaces.name: saveOrganizationProfile
interfaces.description: Create or update the organization profile for the current user, including organization type, annual budget, and program areas.

parameters.name: organizationType
parameters.description: Organization type, e.g., 'nonprofit_501c3', 'government_entity', 'school', 'faith_based', 'fiscally_sponsored_project', 'other'.

parameters.name: programAreaCodes
parameters.description: Array of FocusArea.code values representing the organization's program areas.

interfaces.name: getNotificationSettings
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current user's notification settings, including deadline reminders, grant updates, and news/blog email preferences.

interfaces.name: updateNotificationSettings
interfaces.description: Update the current user's notification settings, such as enabling deadline reminders for a specific number of days before the deadline and disabling news/blog emails.

parameters.name: deadlineReminderDaysBefore
parameters.description: Number of days before the application deadline to send reminders, e.g., 14.

interfaces.name: getEmailAlertOptions
interfaces.description: Get available options for the grant email alerts signup form, including geographic focus choices, frequency options, notification methods, and interest areas.

interfaces.name: subscribeToEmailAlerts
interfaces.description: Create or update a standalone email/SMS alert subscription for grants, capturing email, geographic focus, interests, frequency, and notification methods.

parameters.name: geographicFocus
parameters.description: Geographic focus, e.g., 'entire_county', 'specific_city', 'specific_neighborhood', 'multiple_counties', 'other'.

parameters.name: interestAreaCodes
parameters.description: List of FocusArea.code values indicating areas of interest.

parameters.name: emailFrequency
parameters.description: Frequency of emails, e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly'.

parameters.name: notificationMethods
parameters.description: One or more notification methods, e.g., ['email'] or ['email','sms_text'].

parameters.name: smsPhoneNumber
parameters.description: Required if 'sms_text' is included in notificationMethods.

interfaces.name: getContactHelpContent
interfaces.description: Retrieve general help information and foundation contact details for the Contact & Help page.

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get available topics and grant program choices for the contact form, including options like 'Eligibility Question' and grant programs such as 'Community Impact Grant'.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a message via the contact form, such as an eligibility question about a specific grant program, and record the preferred response method.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Contact topic, e.g., 'eligibility_question', 'technical_issue', 'application_help', 'general_inquiry', 'other'.

parameters.name: grantProgramId
parameters.description: Optional grant program this inquiry is about (e.g., Community Impact Grant).

parameters.name: messageBody
parameters.description: Detailed message including project description, planned start date, and location.

parameters.name: preferredResponseMethod
parameters.description: Preferred response method, e.g., 'email', 'phone_call', 'no_response_needed'.

interfaces.name: buildGrantAwardComparisonView
interfaces.description: Build a comparison view for up to three selected past grant awards, returning normalized data suitable for side-by-side comparison.

parameters.name: grantAwardIds
parameters.description: Array of GrantAward ids selected for comparison (up to three).

interfaces.name: saveGrantAwardComparison
interfaces.description: Save a named comparison of selected past grant awards for future reference.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: User-provided name for the comparison, e.g., 'health_2023_mid_range'.

parameters.name: grantAwardIds
parameters.description: Array of GrantAward ids included in the comparison.

interfaces.name: getSavedGrantComparisons
interfaces.description: Retrieve a list of saved grant comparisons for the current user.

interfaces.name: getAboutFoundationContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Foundation page, including mission, geographic focus, primary focus areas, and an overview of the grantmaking process.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCurrentAccount
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current Account record for the single-user environment, persisted in local storage or an equivalent store.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNotificationSettingsForCurrentAccount
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize NotificationSettings linked to the current account.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultApplicationPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that returns a default ApplicationPlan (e.g., a generic 'My Grants' plan) for use when saving grants without a specific plan.

helperFunctions.name: _mapFocusAreaCodesToNames
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that maps FocusArea.code values to human-readable names for display in search results, details, and comparisons.
